news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态DeFi总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长。数据来自DeFiLlama。
news.summary_en: Solana's DeFi total value locked (TVL) increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3. The upgrade aims to enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism.

news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
